summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Admin 'Live Products' tab and product status controls. All core features working correctly - backend APIs (11/11 tests passed), frontend UI (Live Products tab, status badges, status controls), and storefront filtering logic.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor typo: 'Product mark as out of stockd successfully' should be 'Product marked as out of stock successfully'

action_items: Fix typo in toast message for out of stock status change (AdminPanel.js line ~174)

API endpoints properly secured with admin authentication check
Product status filtering logic correctly implemented in both backend and frontend
seed_data_creation: 4 approved products exist in database with 'live' status
